name: edtNutriTrack
oneLineDescription: AI-powered nutrition tracking application designed to help users easily log meals, understand their dietary habits, and improve overall health
whatItIs: NutriTrack is an AI-powered nutrition tracking application designed to help users easily log meals, understand their dietary habits, and improve overall health. The product focuses on speed, simplicity, and intelligent automation to reduce the friction typically associated with food tracking.
crossCuttingPrinciples: Focus on speed, simplicity, and intelligent automation to reduce friction
Free tier has manual meal logging and limited AI usage, premium tier has unlimited AI photo logging
specSummary: NutriTrack is an AI-powered nutrition tracking application that aims to simplify daily nutrition monitoring through intelligent automation. The product targets individuals managing weight, fitness enthusiasts tracking macros, busy users seeking low-effort logging, and nutrition beginners needing guidance. Core functionality includes manual meal logging, AI-powered photo recognition for food identification and calorie estimation, comprehensive nutrition tracking with daily calorie and macronutrient breakdowns, customizable goals for weight management, progress visualization through charts, and personalized insights with improvement suggestions. The technical architecture employs React Native for mobile-first design, Node.js with Express for backend services, PostgreSQL for structured data storage, cloud storage for images, and OpenAI integration for food recognition. The monetization strategy offers a free tier with manual logging and basic tracking, while a premium subscription provides unlimited AI features, advanced insights, and meal recommendations. The MVP scope focuses on user authentication, manual meal logging, basic calorie tracking, a simple dashboard, and one AI feature, deliberately excluding advanced meal planning, analytics, wearable integrations, and social features for post-MVP development.
